name: Tibet GaoZheng Explosive Co., Ltd.
summary: Tibet GaoZheng Explosive Co., Ltd. produces and sells civilian explosives in China. The company offers powdered emulsion explosives and emulsion gel explosives. It also engages in the transportation and distribution of dangerous goods, general cargo transportation and distribution, loading and unloading and transportation agents, cargo storage management, vehicle repair and maintenance, etc. The company was founded in 2014 and is based in Lhasa, China.
